name_cn:
【Full set packaging】
Small size Blush Pink In Stock!!️
Toujours vertical series small, exclusive market basket, a bit too beautiful, high-value bag, easily mastering a sense of sophistication, oversized quilted design, paired with classic letter accessories, full of modern fashion sense, bag structure is very soft, calfskin material full of sophistication, unique buckle clasp that folds on the side when fastened, comes with a long shoulder strap, practicality full score, capacity is also very nice, daily travel items all fit
size:16*12*18cm
